text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
I managed to place on the board. 
This one was challenging.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
I thought I did well, but this feeling 
growing within me… how do I say it…

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: For better or for worse, it's nostalgic.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
…Needless to say, I can't 
be satisfied with this.
choice_data_list: That's right, we have to aim higher
That's right, we have to aim higher

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
…Needless to say, I can't 
be satisfied with this.
choice_data_list: That's right, we have to aim higher
That's right, we have to aim higher

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
I want to believe that too. If I can take 
it just one step further… give it my best 
shot, then I can win.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
I'll show you the view of the 
winner in the next one!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, to change a dreary scenery, 
you can only start by running away 
from there.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Next time I'll be number one. 
I'm gonna do it Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: It is because I run, and because I want to win.
